summary: Added US-841 jsdom integration coverage for start/resume behavior across UI controller and localStorage persistence. Tests cover empty boot and explicit bullet start, valid unfinished resume, explicit start-new replacement with subsequent boot, incompatible saved data fallback, finished save fallback, and completed bullet target fallback.

tests_run.details: 9 test files passed, 71 tests passed, production build passed

verification_environment.integration_layer: Vitest jsdom through project npm scripts; no Playwright dependency is present in package.json

evidence_matrix.scenario: Empty localStorage boot shows start screen, player selects a supported bullet size, first deal is created and persisted, and a subsequent boot offers resume/start-new for that new bullet.
Valid unfinished active bullet prompts for continue, then renders saved phase, actor/status, hand-card count, log, persisted bullet size, seed, and score table.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Score table is verified through persistence because current UI has no dedicated score table surface.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Start-new from a valid unfinished save replaces the active bullet, starts with fresh technical history, and subsequent boot offers resume/start-new for the replacement.
evidence_matrix.limitations: LocalStorage persistence only; no backend exists.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Corrupt JSON, malformed schema-1 state, unsupported schema, finished save, and completed bullet target all fall back to start-only with no continue option and no active bullet.

quality_gate_matrix.command_or_source: Chandrasekhar and Hooke review of src/test/startResume.integration.test.ts
quality_gate_matrix.accepted_risk: Real-browser keyboard/focus and visual behavior remain assigned to MZ-105/MZ-106.

quality_gate_matrix.limitations: No live backend or browser because project has neither backend nor Playwright dependency.
quality_gate_matrix.accepted_risk: None for scoped jsdom integration owner task.

quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Covers localStorage schema compatibility and invalid saved data fallback.
quality_gate_matrix.accepted_risk: None for local schema fixture scope.

findings: Invalid-save fallback needed corrupt JSON and malformed schema-1 cases.
Start-new replacement needed subsequent boot coverage.
Resume restoration assertions needed broader phase/actor/hand/log/score evidence.
reviews.resolution: Expanded src/test/startResume.integration.test.ts and re-ran targeted/full verification.
Accepted jsdom integration layer; noted real-browser visual/focus risks belong to later tasks.
Prior P1/P2 gaps resolved; MZ-104 accepted.
